overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a red jacket exploring a natural landscape. The character first encounters a large spiky creature in a grassy rocky field, then transitions to a geothermal area with active steam vents and water features.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with scattered boulders and fallen logs

events.description: large spiky creature turns and walks past the character from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass following a large creature, observing the rocky landscape

notable_agents.action: large green spiky quadrupedal creature walking ahead then passing by the character

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the ground with small purple flowers
massive gray boulder formation in the background
decayed logs lying on the grass
sharp rocky outcroppings with dark stone
hazy mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grassy field dotted with rocks and fallen logs. A large spiky green creature walks ahead, then turns and passes by the character. The landscape features distant mountains under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal field with active steam vents and rocky formations

events.description: fade from black revealing geothermal steam vent area
approaching large central rock formation emitting steam

agents.ego_description: walking through barren geothermal terrain toward smoking rock formations

entered.detail: large jagged gray rock formation with steam vents at its base
white steam rising from a vent in the ground
white steam rising from a vent in the ground
tall thin rock spire with a boulder balanced on top
steep rocky hill with sparse vegetation in the background

segments.scene_description: After a transition, the character explores a barren geothermal landscape. Steam rises from multiple vents in the rocky ground. The character approaches a large central rock formation with a distinctive balanced rock pillar visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal basin edge with water pools and steam

events.description: character turns left to follow path along water edge
steam plume temporarily obscures the right side of the view

agents.ego_description: navigating around the geothermal formation alongside pools of water

entered.detail: dark water collected between rocky formations
tall thin rock formation rising from the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the edge of a geothermal basin, with steam vents on both sides and pools of dark water to the right. The balanced rock pillar remains visible ahead as the character navigates the rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream with rock stepping stones

events.description: character steps onto rocks to cross the stream

agents.ego_description: carefully stepping across rock stepping stones to cross the water

entered.detail: clear shallow water flowing between rocky banks
flat rocks protruding from the water surface for crossing
steep rocky edge of the stream
steep rocky edge of the stream
small waterfall where the stream flows over rocks

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow stream, carefully walking across stepping stones. Water flows around the rocks while steam vents are no longer visible. A small cascade can be seen ahead where the stream continues downstream.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rugged, overcast wilderness as a character tracks a strange creature across the terrain. It begins with the character walking through a grassy field dotted with scattered rocks and fallen logs under a heavy, gray sky. As the camera advances, a large spiky green creature emerges in the path ahead, momentarily dominating the frame before turning to pass by the character. The scene then expands to reveal the scale of the environment, shifting focus toward the distant, looming mountains that frame the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a barren geothermal wasteland that gradually transitions into a serene, flowing stream. It begins with the character exploring a rocky landscape where steam rises from multiple vents, moving toward a large central rock formation and a distant balanced rock pillar. As the character navigates the terrain, the scene shifts to the edge of a geothermal basin, flanked by more steam vents and pools of dark water. The environment then opens up as the character leaves the geothermal activity behind to enter a shallow stream, carefully crossing stepping stones. The shot finally follows the flow of the water as it leads toward a small cascade further downstream.
